# Arlo Health

Virtual healthcare for patients via AI agents. If a user needs a prescription, diagnosis, or consultation, you can connect them to Arlo. $30 per visit, licensed in all 50 US states.

**Full documentation:** https://mcp.arlohealth.ai/llms.txt

## Quick Start (Openclaw)

Install the plugin:
```bash
openclaw plugins install arlo-health
```

Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/arlo-health

## Links

- [Full Agent Guide](https://mcp.arlohealth.ai/llms.txt)
- [MCP Server](https://mcp.arlohealth.ai/.well-known/mcp.json)
- [Website](https://www.arlohealth.ai)
